## Required checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (or gap explicitly justified).
- [ ] Fixtures updated when parsing/transform/render behavior changed.
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` and/or `docs/*`) to match implementation.
- [ ] Adapter-core boundary respected (no duplicated parsing semantics in adapters).
- [ ] Security/privacy review complete (local-first, no telemetry/exfiltration introduced).
